BLAZE.description: Triggers [gold]Embers[/gold] on EVERYONE without reducing its count.
BLAZE.title: Blaze
EMBERS.description: Afflicted creatures take damage and lose half of their stack at the end of their turn.
EMBERS.title: Embers
HEAT_COUNT.description: Can collect up to 20 Heat. Reduced by certain cards. At 20 Heat gain 1 [gold]Overheat[/gold].
HEAT_COUNT.title: Heat
OVERHEAT.description: Gain one of two powerful effects unique to each stack (max 3).
OVERHEAT.title: Overheat
FLYING.title: Flying
CONSUMPTION.description: When at [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Consumption[/gold] gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold] and draw a card, then lose [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Consumption[/gold].
CONSUMPTION.title: Consumption
